description_long: This is a rectangular desk with a light-colored, smooth tabletop and a contrasting darker frame and legs. The desk features four straight legs, providing stable support, and a single drawer with a metallic handle on the right side, suitable for storing small items. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with clean lines and no decorative elements. The materials appear to be a combination of wood or engineered wood for the main structure and metal for the drawer handle. The desk's proportions suggest it is intended for individual use, such as writing or working on a computer. Its neutral color palette and practical design make it suitable for modern urban environments.
description: A modern, rectangular desk with a light top, dark legs, and a single right-side drawer with a metal handle. The design is minimalist and functional.
description_view_0: The desk is seen from the narrow end, showing the light tabletop and two dark legs, with no drawer visible.
description_view_1: The desk is viewed from the long side, displaying the full width of the tabletop and all four legs, with the drawer not visible.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow end of the desk is visible, similar to view 0, with no drawer or handle in sight.
description_view_3: The desk is shown from the front, revealing the right-side drawer with a metallic handle and the full tabletop.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawer and handle is intended to face the user, serving as the front of the desk, while the opposite side is the back.
